toolbox_name: SparkFun Qwiic Twist RGB Rotary Encoder

qwiic_twist_init.tooltip: Initialize SparkFun Qwiic Twist rotary encoder (I2C default address 0x3F)

qwiic_twist_get_count.tooltip: Read encoder cumulative count value (increases clockwise)

qwiic_twist_is_moved.tooltip: Check if encoder has been rotated since last call

qwiic_twist_is_clicked.tooltip: Check if button was clicked (pressed then released)

qwiic_twist_is_pressed.tooltip: Check if button is currently in pressed state

qwiic_twist_set_color.message0: Twist %1 set color R %2 G %3 B %4
qwiic_twist_set_color.tooltip: Set encoder RGB LED color (each channel 0-255)
